title: Tax offset questions T3-T9
description: How to complete the tax offset questions T3 to T9 in your paper supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, tax return, 2024, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

child_links.title: T3 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T3 if you made contributions to a complying superannuation fund or RSA on behalf of your spouse.

child_links.title: T4 Zone or overseas forces 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T4 if you want to claim a zone or overseas forces tax offset.

child_links.title: T5 Invalid and invalid carer 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T5 if you maintained a person who was 16 years old or older receiving particular government payments.

child_links.title: T6 Landcare and water facility 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T6 if you have an unused 'landcare and water facility' tax offset from a previous year.

child_links.title: T7 Early stage venture capital limited partnership 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T7 to claim the early stage venture capital limited partnership tax offset.

child_links.title: T8 Early stage investor 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T8 to claim the early stage investor tax offset.

child_links.title: T9 Other refundable tax offsets 2024
child_links.description: Complete question T9 to claim other tax offsets.

child_links.title: Total supplement tax offsets 2024
child_links.description: Complete the total supplement tax offsets section in your supplementary tax return.
